messages.content: The Trailbreaker 3.0 uses charger RP-11-12-01. Just say 'order it' and I'll create a direct secure checkout link for you.
There are single pin and triple pin and 2amp and 3amp
Could you please check your current charger or the charging port on your battery? This will help us confirm the exact replacement you need.
Could you confirm if you need the 2A or 3A charger, and whether it's a single pin or triple pin? This will ensure you get the correct charger for your Trailbreaker 3.0.

To ensure you get the right charger for your Trailbreaker 3.0, I recommend checking the charging port on your battery or the current charger you have. If you can provide a photo or description of the connector, I can help identify the correct charger. Alternatively, you can also call us at (952) 283-0777 for assistance.
The Trailbreaker 3.0 uses a single pin 2A charger, part number RP-11-12-01. Just say 'order it' and I'll create a direct secure checkout link for you.
So do I go 3amp or amp
For your Trailbreaker 3.0, you should use the 2A charger (RP-11-12-01). Just say 'order it' and I'll create a direct secure checkout link for you.
